[package]

description.workspace = true

[lints]
workspace = true

[lib]
test = false
doctest = false

[[example]]
name = "compiler"
path = "examples/compiler.rs"
required-features = ["full"]

[dependencies]
oxc_allocator = { workspace = true }

oxc_span = { workspace = true }
oxc_syntax = { workspace = true }

oxc_transformer_plugins = { workspace = true, optional = true }

[features]
default = ["regular_expression"]

full = [
  "codegen",
  "mangler",
  "minifier",
  "semantic",

  "oxc_syntax/serialize",
]

# Only for conformance tests
conformance = ["oxc_ast_visit/conformance"]

[package.metadata.docs.rs]
all-features = true

content.text:
Implemented the minifier fix.

Summary:
- Fixed unsafe removal of identifier assignment expressions in `remove_unused_assignment_expr`.
- The bug was that write-only assignments were treated as removable when there were no read references, even if there were write references. This allowed `a = ...` inside `a == null && (a = ...)` / `??=` patterns to be dropped incorrectly.
- Added a minimal regression test:
  - `let a; a == null && (a = b)` now minifies to `let a; a ??= b`, preserving the guarded assignment instead of dropping the guard/assignment behavior.

Validation:
- Ran targeted test:
  - `cargo test -p oxc_minifier peephole::remove_unused_expression::test_logical_expression -- --nocapture`
  - Passed.

Final modified files:
- `crates/oxc_minifier/src/peephole/remove_unused_expression.rs`
- `crates/oxc_minifier/tests/peephole/remove_unused_expression.rs`

Note:
- I did not commit changes.
- I removed the broader temporary exploratory test/API changes and kept only the minimal source fix plus regression test.
